22 February 2026 Military News

Operations
Defense Policy / Programs
Defense Industry
Other Conflicts
News Reports

Current Operations

  • US Troops in Middle East Being Redeployed for New Missions, Not Evacuated - Reports Sputnik 22 Feb 2026 -- Hundreds of US troops stationed at military bases in Qatar and Bahrain have been redeployed for other missions and operations, not evacuated, the New York Times reported.

Defense Policy / Programs

  • Denmark rejects Trump's plan to send US hospital ship to Greenland Press TV 22 Feb 2026 -- The leaders of Greenland and Denmark have rejected US President Donald Trump's plan to dispatch a hospital ship to the Arctic territory, saying the island does not need foreign medical assistance.

  • Russian Defence Minister Andrei Belousov congratulates servicemen and veterans on Defender of Fatherland Day Russia MoD 22 Feb 2026

  • AUKUS enters new era with the arrival of UK submarine into Western Australia Australia DOD 22 Feb 2026 -- HMS Anson has arrived at Western Australia's HMAS Stirling for the first-ever maintenance activity on a United Kingdom nuclear-powered submarine in Australia, marking a historic step in our nation's readiness to operate and maintain conventionally-armed, nuclear-powered submarines.

  • PH Navy to commission 2 brand-new ships on Feb. 24 Philippine News Agency 22 Feb 2026 -- The Philippine Navy (PN) will be christening and commissioning two brand-new ships, an offshore patrol vessel and a fast attack interdiction craft (FAIC), at Naval Operating Base-Subic in Zambales on Feb. 24.

  • Japan-U.S. Extended Deterrence Dialogue Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Japan 22 Feb 2026

  • Trump raises new global tariff from 10 pct to 15 pct Global Times 22 Feb 2026 -- In a ruling with deep significance for global trade, companies and the pocketbook of every US citizen, the US Supreme Court ruled on Friday that US President Donald Trump's sweeping tariffs under a law meant for use in national emergencies are illegal,according to local media.
  • Trump raises new global tariff from 10 pct to 15 pct People's Daily 22 Feb 2026 -- U.S. President Donald Trump said Saturday he will raise the new global tariff to 15 percent, one day after he announced a 10 percent worldwide duty following a heavy blow from the Supreme Court.

Defense Industry

Other Conflicts


    Ukraine Conflict News

    Operation Iron Swords / Operation Al-Aqsa Flood | Operation Northern Arrows | Giddeon's Chariots

  • Hamas: Civilian deaths in Gaza show 'genocidal war' ongoing IRNA 22 Feb 2026 -- Hamas has stated that the continued killing of civilians in the Gaza Strip proves that the "genocidal war" has not stopped, but has merely changed its form.

  • Palestinians granted only 66 building permits in West Bank over 11 years: Report Press TV 22 Feb 2026 -- The Israeli regime has granted only 66 building permits to Palestinians in the occupied West Bank over an 11-year period, Israeli media reports say.

  • Hezbollah has 'no choice' but to defend itself after deadly Israeli strikes: Official Press TV 22 Feb 2026 -- A senior Hezbollah official says the Lebanese resistance movement "has no longer any option" but to defend itself after the deadliest Israeli strikes in weeks hit the Beqaa Valley in eastern Lebanon and killed eight members of the group, including high-profile commander Hussein Mohammed Yaghi.
  • Ansarallah: Israeli attacks on Lebanon violate international charters IRNA 22 Feb 2026 -- The political bureau of Yemen's Ansarallah movement has strongly condemned Israel's deadly aggression against innocent civilians in Lebanon's Bekaa region, calling it a flagrant violation of all human values and international charters and conventions.
  • Ansarullah decries Israel's bloody massacre in east Lebanon, urges unified Arab action Press TV 22 Feb 2026 -- Yemen's Ansarullah resistance movement has strongly condemned the Israeli rgeime's "bloody massacre" in Lebanon's eastern Beqaa region, which killed roughly a dozen people and wounded many more, calling it a flagrant violation of humanitarian values and international conventions.

  • Hamas: Huckabee's remarks expose 'American bias towards Zionist domination, annexation' Press TV 22 Feb 2026 -- Gaza's Hamas resistance movement has condemned recent comments by the US ambassador to the occupied territories, saying they reflected a colonialist mindset and demonstrated Washington's alignment with "Zionist domination and annexation" projects.

  • Huckabee mocks Arab League's condemnation of his remarks endorsing Israel's biblical territorial claims Press TV 22 Feb 2026 -- US Ambassador to Israeli-occupied territories Mike Huckabee has pushed back against widespread criticism and mocked the Arab League's condemnation following his recent interview with American journalist Tucker Carlson, in which he endorsed the notion of Israel expanding its territory across much of the West Asia region based on biblical interpretations.

  • Iran slams US envoy's endorsement of 'Greater Israel' scheme IRNA 22 Feb 2026 -- Iran has condemned recent comments by the US ambassador to the occupied Palestine, saying they were a "bold testament" to US complicity in the Israeli regime's expansionist wars in the region.
  • Iran, other Muslim states slam US envoy's endorsement of 'Greater Israel' plot Press TV 22 Feb 2026 -- Iran, along with several Islamic and Arab countries and organizations, has condemned comments by the US ambassador to the occupied territories, who suggested Israel has a right to expand its occupation to much of West Asia.

  • Emergency Ministerial Meeting of the OIC Executive Committee on Illegal Israeli Decisions Organization of Islamic Cooperation (OIC) 22 Feb 2026 -- The Organization of Islamic Cooperation (OIC) will hold an emergency meeting of the Open-ended Executive Committee at the level of Foreign Ministers to discuss the illegal Israeli occupation decisions aimed at promoting settlement, annexation and attempting to impose alleged Israeli sovereignty on the occupied West Bank, on Thursday, 26 February 2026, at the OIC General Secretariat in Jeddah, Kingdom of Saudi Arabia
  • Joint Statement by the Foreign Ministries of Türkiye, Egypt, Jordan, Lebanon, Indonesia, Kuwait, Palestine, Qatar, Oman, Pakistan, Bahrain, Saudi Arabia, Syria, UAE and the secretariats of the OIC, the LAS, the GCC, 22 February 2026 Republic of Turkey Ministry of Foreign Affairs 22 Feb 2026
  • Iraq slams U.S. ambassador's claims on Israel's right to all Mideast land People's Daily 22 Feb 2026 -- Iraq's Foreign Ministry on Saturday evening strongly condemned recent remarks by U.S. Ambassador to Israel Mike Huckabee regarding potential Israeli control over the entire Middle East, describing them as a "serious transgression."

    • Other Conflicts

  • Statement by Spokesperson of Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Republic of Korea on So-Called "Dokdo Day" Event Held by Japan's Shimane Prefecture ROK MFA 22 Feb 2026

  • Pakistan Launches Fresh Attacks Inside Afghanistan Amid Rising Tensions RFE/RL 22 Feb 2026 -- Pakistan said it launched strikes on seven militant sites inside Afghanistan in a "retributive response" to recent suicide attacks it said were carried out by Afghan-based extremists, as tensions escalated between the two South Asian neighbors.
  • Pakistan launches cross-border strikes into Afghanistan after series of suicide bombings Press TV 22 Feb 2026 -- Pakistan's Ministry of Information says its military launched strikes along the border with Afghanistan, targeting hideouts of militants believed to be behind recent attacks across the country.
  • Afghanistan Vows Measured Response to Pakistan's Airstrikes - Defense Ministry Sputnik 22 Feb 2026 -- Afghanistan will deliver a measured and appropriate response at the right moment to Pakistan's act of aggression, which killed dozens of Afghan civilians, the Afghan Defense Ministry said on Sunday.

  • Joint statement on protection of civilians and humanitarian operations in Sudan European External Action Service (EEAS) 22 Feb 2026
  • Sudan's mining sector suffers $7 billion loss amid ongoing civil war Press TV 22 Feb 2026 -- Sudan's mining sector has incurred $7 billion in losses as the country's 34-month-long war continues to disrupt operations, the national minerals authority reports.

  • Somaliland ready to give US access to its minerals, military bases: Minister Press TV 22 Feb 2026 -- A Somaliland official has revealed that the country's leadership is prepared to give the United States access to its mineral resources and military bases in exchange for recognition of the breakaway entity as an independent state.

News Reports

  • Russia Sees UK Trace in Attempted Assassination of Lt. Gen. Alexeyev - FSB Chief Sputnik 22 Feb 2026 -- The United Kingdom is suspected to be behind the Ukrainian special services' attempt on the life of Russian Lt. Gen. Vladimir Alexeyev, Russian Federal Security Service (FSB) Director Alexander Bortnikov said.

  • NSB Completes Declassification and Transfer of All Political Archives from Martial Law Period ROC NSB 22 Feb 2026 -- In order to promote transitional justice and the openness of political archives, the National Security Bureau (NSB) previously took the initiative to conduct an inventory of the possessed archives.
  • PLA activities in the waters and airspace around Taiwan ROC MND 22 Feb 2026

  • Third-day Sitting of Ninth WPK Congress Comrade Kim Jong Un Makes Report ReviewingWork of Eighth-term C.C., WPK KCNA 22 Feb 2026 -- The Ninth Congress of the Workers' Party of Korea is intensifying the most comprehensive political activities in carrying out its leadership mission as the political staff of the socialist cause.
  • Third WPK Congress Recorded in History of Korean Revolution KCNA 22 Feb 2026 -- The Third Congress of the Workers' Party of Korea was held from April 23 to 29, 1956.

  • Geneva to Host US-Iran Talks on Thursday - Omani Foreign Minister Sputnik 22 Feb 2026 -- The next round of negotiations between the United States and Iran will be held in Geneva on February 26, Omani Foreign Minister Badr Albusaidi announced on Sunday.
  • Pezeshkian: Recent talks with US have yielded encouraging signals IRNA 22 Feb 2026 -- President Masoud Pezeshkian says recent talks between Iran and the United States have produced "encouraging signals," however, Iran remains ready for any possible scenario.
  • New round of negotiations with US likely set for Thursday: Iran foreign minister IRNA 22 Feb 2026 -- Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi says he will likely meet US Special Envoy Steve Witkoff on Thursday in Geneva, Switzerland, for a new round of nuclear negotiations.
  • Chance still exists for win-win solution to Iran's nuclear issue: Araghchi Press TV 22 Feb 2026 -- Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi says there is still "a good chance" for a diplomatic solution to the nuclear dispute based on a win-win outcome for all sides.
  • Iranian Official Says Indirect Talks With US Expected in Early March - Reports Sputnik 22 Feb 2026 -- A senior Iranian official said that indirect talks between Iran and the US are expected in early March, Reuters reported on Sunday.
  • Iranian commander dismisses US buildup of warships in West Asia as 'theatrical gesture' Press TV 22 Feb 2026 -- An Iranian military commander has dismissed as "theatrical" the US buildup of warships and fighter jets in the West Asia region over the past few weeks amid tensions over Tehran's civilian nuclear program, stating that the Leader of the Islamic Revolution has vigorously responded to such over-the-top maneuvers.
  • Trump 'curious' why Iran hasn't 'capitulated' despite massive US military buildup: Witkoff Press TV 22 Feb 2026 -- US special envoy to West Asia, Steve Witkoff, said on Saturday that US President Donald Trump is "curious" as to why Iran has not "capitulated" to US demands to strike a deal on its nuclear program.
  • US Ready to Hold New Nuclear Talks With Iran on Friday If Receives Deal Proposal - Reports Sputnik 22 Feb 2026 -- The United States is ready to hold a new round of nuclear talks with Iran in Geneva on February 27, provided that it receives a detailed proposal for a nuclear deal within 48 hours, the Axios news portal reported on Sunday, citing a senior US official.
  • Hawkish US senator pushes Trump to ignore aides, press ahead with war against Iran Press TV 22 Feb 2026 -- Hawkish US Senator Lindsey Graham has called on President Donald Trump not to yield to advisers warning against an act of aggression against Iran.
  • Iran, Russia negotiations ongoing for Rasht-Astara railway project: Official IRNA 22 Feb 2026 -- The CEO of Iran's Roads and Transport Infrastructure Construction and Development Company, Houshang Bazvand, says technical and contractual negotiations for the Rasht-Astara railway project are still ongoing between Iran and Russia.
  • New Student Protests Highlight Ongoing Unrest In Tehran RFE/RL 22 Feb 2026 -- Iranian students faced off with security forces outside Tehran universities for the second day in a row, according to videos published online, in the biggest reported show of opposition in the capital since the deadly crackdown last month.
  • Any US attack on Iran will be met with decisive missile force: Lebanese MP Press TV 22 Feb 2026 -- A Lebanese lawmaker says US naval threats against Iran would be met with the Islamic Republic's decisive missile force, warning that Tehran possesses the capability to send American vessels to the seabed.
  • UN very concerned about situation surrounding Iran: spokesperson People's Daily 22 Feb 2026 -- The United Nations is very concerned about the situation surrounding Iran, Stephane Dujarric, spokesperson for the UN secretary-general, said Friday.

  • PM Netanyahu's Remarks at the Start of Today's Government Meeting Israel - Prime Minister 22 Feb 2026
  • PM Netanyahu at Today's Government Meeting, on the Government Decision to Accelerate Building an AI Server Farm Israel - Prime Minister 22 Feb 2026

  • Transcript of Special Briefing by MEA on State visit of President of Brazil to India (February 21, 2026) India MEA 22 Feb 2026

  • Meeting between State Minister Miyazaki and Secretary of Justice of Micronesia Ministry of Defense of Japan 22 Feb 2026 -- On February 22, 2026, Defense State Minister MIYAZAKI Masahisa held a meeting with Hon.Mr. Leonito Bakalando Jr., Secretary of Justice of Micronesia, visiting Japan for the "3rd Japan-Pacific Islands Defense Dialogue."
